targets.notes: Validated by SBTi; target excludes less than 3% of Scope 1 and 2 emissions in the base year and excludes Scope 3 categories capital goods, fuel and energy related activities, and waste generated in operations, which are approximately 10% of base year Scope 3 emissions.
targets.title: SBTi-validated emissions reduction target

targets.boundary: Entire carbon footprint across the value chain.
targets.notes: Goal to achieve a 75% reduction in gross emissions by 2030 versus 2015 and to be carbon neutral for the entire footprint; emissions pathway is illustrative and subject to modeling uncertainty.
targets.title: Apple 2030 carbon neutrality goal for entire footprint

targets.boundary: Corporate emissions footprint, including direct Scope 1, indirect Scope 2, and specified Scope 3 categories material and relevant to Apple.
targets.notes: Apple is carbon neutral for corporate emissions as of April 2020 and maintains this status through the retirement of carbon credits.
targets.title: Carbon neutrality for corporate emissions from April 2020

targets.notes: Plan to reach carbon neutrality beginning with the fiscal year 2030 carbon footprint.
targets.title: Plan to reach carbon neutrality beginning with FY2030 carbon footprint
